title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Mumbai University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Mumbai University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Mumbai University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Mumbai University:
Mumbai University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mumbai University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
